case_title: TIRADO, CLAUDIA VS LANDMARK REALTY , LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIRADO, CLAUDIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LANDMARK REALTY , LLC JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28377 ON 07/12/07. SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ROBERT IMHOFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIRADO, CLAUDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDMARK REALTY , LLC $986.12 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.12, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PREVIOUS PAYMENTS TENDERED AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF.
